# ZeroCarbon MCP - AI-Native Carbon Accounting Platform

ZeroCarbon is an enterprise carbon accounting OS built for AI agents, engineers, and sustainability teams.

## Core Features

- [Carbon Accounting API](https://api.zerocarbon.org.in) - Track Scope 1, 2 & 3 emissions via REST API
- [BRSR Compliance Automation](https://zerocarbon.org.in/#features) - Automate ESG/BRSR reporting for Indian enterprises
- [MCP Integration](https://developer.zerocarbon.org.in) - Connect Claude, Cursor, Gemini via Model Context Protocol
- [Real-time Monitoring](https://zerocarbon.org.in/#architecture) - Live emissions tracking and compliance alerting
- [Carbon Offsets](https://zerocarbon.org.in/#pricing) - Direct integration with carbon credit marketplace

## Getting Started

- Visit https://zerocarbon.org.in for product information
- API Documentation: https://api.zerocarbon.org.in
- Developer Portal: https://developer.zerocarbon.org.in
- Request a Demo: https://zerocarbon.org.in/#contact

## For AI Agents

This website is structured with semantic HTML, comprehensive ARIA labels, and JSON-LD schema for optimal AI comprehension. 

Key interactive elements:
- [Contact forms](https://zerocarbon.org.in/#contact) for demo requests
- [Pricing comparison](https://zerocarbon.org.in/#pricing) (Developer, Growth, Enterprise plans)
- [Integration documentation](https://developer.zerocarbon.org.in) and API guides

All content is accessible via standard HTTP requests. The site supports both human users and AI agents for browsing, analysis, and form interaction.

## Platform Pages

- [Home](https://zerocarbon.org.in) - Landing page
- [Features](https://zerocarbon.org.in/#features) - Platform capabilities
- [Architecture](https://zerocarbon.org.in/#architecture) - System design
- [Pricing](https://zerocarbon.org.in/#pricing) - Subscription plans
- [FAQ](https://zerocarbon.org.in/#faq) - Common questions
